articles.headline: AI ‘actor’ Tilly Norwood put out the worst song I’ve ever heard
articles.deck: This song is an AI actor's rallying cry to other AI actors, urging them to keep going despite the naysayers who doubt their humanity. Literally no one can relate to this.

articles.headline: Ford’s new AI assistant will help fleet owners know if seatbelts are being used
articles.deck: Ford Pro AI debuted at Work Truck Week in Indianapolis and is now available to all of its U.S.-based Pro telematics subscribers.

articles.headline: Zendesk acquires agentic customer service startup Forethought
articles.deck: Forethought was years ahead of its time and the 2018 winner of TechCrunch Battlefield.

articles.headline: Netflix may have paid $600 million for Ben Affleck’s AI startup
articles.deck: This deal could rank as among the streaming giant's largest acquisitions ever.

articles.headline: Lovable says it added $100M in revenue last month alone, with just 146 employees
articles.deck: Swedish vibe-coding unicorn Lovable crossed $400 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) in February.

articles.headline: Replit snags $9B valuation 6 months after hitting $3B
articles.deck: Replit raised a new $400 million round and said it hopes to have $1B in ARR by year's end.

articles.headline: WordPress debuts a private workspace that runs in your browser via a new service, my.WordPress.net
articles.deck: WordPress’s new browser-based service lets users create private sites without hosting or signing up, turning the platform into a personal workspace for writing, research, and AI tools.

articles.headline: Rivian spin-out Mind Robotics raises $500M for industrial AI-powered robots
articles.deck: The startup, which was created by Rivian founder RJ Scaringe, is looking to train on data from, and deploy in, Rivian's factory.

articles.headline: Meta’s Moltbook deal points to a future built around AI agents
articles.deck: Meta’s Moltbook acquisition may look odd at first, but the deal could signal how Meta sees AI agents shaping future advertising and commerce on an agentic web.

articles.headline: Amazon expands a program that lets customers shop from other retailers’ sites
articles.deck: The changes allow more merchants to participate in Amazon's Shop Direct program, which sends Amazon customers to other retailers' websites.

articles.headline: Canopii looks to succeed where past indoor farms have not
articles.deck: Canopii's robotic farms can autonomously grow 40,000 pounds of herbs and leafy greens a year while being the size of a basketball court.

articles.headline: Google brings Gemini in Chrome to India
articles.deck: The rollout will let users access Gemini in Chrome through a sidebar on desktop, enabling them to ask Google's AI chatbot questions about the content on the screen; get information from their Gmail, K

articles.headline: Amazon launches its healthcare AI assistant on its website and app
articles.deck: Health AI can answer questions, explain health records, manage prescription renewals, book appointments, and more.

articles.headline: AI-powered apps struggle with long-term retention, new report shows
articles.deck:
AI can drive stronger early
monetization for apps, but sustaining value remains the challenge, RevenueCat's latest report finds.

articles.headline: ChatGPT can now create interactive visuals to help you understand math and science concepts
articles.deck: Instead of just reading an explanation or looking at a static diagram, users can now engage directly with interactive visuals.

articles.headline: AgentMail raises $6M to build an email service for AI agents
articles.deck: AgentMail provides an API platform that lets you give AI agents their own email inboxes, with support for two-way conversations, parsing, threading, labeling, searching, and replying.

articles.headline: Thinking Machines Lab inks massive compute deal with Nvidia
articles.deck: The multi-year deal involves at least a gigawatt of compute power and also includes a strategic investment from Nvidia.

articles.headline: Google gives in to users’ complaints over AI-powered ‘Ask Photos’ search feature
articles.deck: The option appears on the Google Photos Search screen and lets users pick which experience they want.

articles.headline: Legora reaches $5.55 billion valuation as AI legal tech boom endures
articles.deck: Legora, an AI platform for lawyers, is now valued at $5.55 billion following a $550 million Series D led by Accel to fuel its growth in the U.S.

articles.headline: Meta acquired Moltbook, the AI agent social network that went viral because of fake posts
articles.deck: Meta says that Moltbook's approach to "connecting agents through an always-on-directory" is novel.
